title: Adenosine
description: Adrenaline but I added more mods
body:
Nothing really special about this pack, just added some mods to [adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline), might update this a bit more times, but probably not. Enjoy!

Mod list:
- More Culling
- YetAnotherConfigLib (ads)
- Sodium
- FerriteCore
- Zoomify (ads)
- ThreadTweak
- Dynamic FPS
- Replay Mod (ads)
- Lithium
- Fabric API
- Enhanced Block Entities
- EntityCulling
- Cloth Config v13
- YOSBR
- CraftPresence (ads)
- Mod Menu (ads)
- Indium
- ModernFix
- ImmediatelyFast
- Fabric Language Kotlin (ads)
- AppleSkin (ads)
- Just Enough Items (ads)

Any mods marked as (ads) are new to adenosine
